No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

Discussed and The court vacated its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS D. CAMPBELL AND THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA, ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE OF THE COURTS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to 7/31/12 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Pending determination by the Presiding Judge of the application for permission to file complaint. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Thomas E. Moore, (D62389-Californi Medical Facility) 707-449-6510, Plaintiff in Pro Per, appearing by telephone

No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.
